title: Why Won’t Europe Help Trump in Iran? Let’s Count the Reasons.
summary_full: President Trump says his NATO allies are disloyal for not helping the United States to clear an oil blockade. But they have a long list of incentives to refuse.
summary_public: President Trump says his NATO allies are disloyal for not helping the United States to clear an oil blockade. But they have a long list of incentives to refuse.
